query:
INSERT INTO products (categoryId, name, slug, shortDescription, description, price, comparePrice, brand, sku, stock, images, specifications, featured, active) VALUES
(1, 'MacBook Pro 16" M3 Pro', 'macbook-pro-16-m3-pro', 'Apple M3 Pro chip with 18GB RAM and 512GB SSD', 'The MacBook Pro 16" with M3 Pro delivers extraordinary performance for professionals. Featuring the Apple M3 Pro chip, a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, and up to 22 hours of battery life.', '2499.00', '2699.00', 'Apple', 'MBP16-M3PRO-512', 15,
  JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517336714731-489689fd1ca8?w=800&q=80', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611186871525-b2e1e7e8e9e2?w=800&q=80'),
  JSON_OBJECT('Chip', 'Apple M3 Pro', 'RAM', '18GB Unified Memory', 'Storage', '512GB SSD', 'Display', '16.2" Liquid Retina XDR', 'Battery', 'Up to 22 hours', 'Weight', '2.14 kg', 'OS', 'macOS Sonoma'),
  true, true),

(1, 'Dell XPS 15 OLED', 'dell-xps-15-oled', 'Intel Core i9 with RTX 4060 and 4K OLED display', 'The Dell XPS 15 combines stunning OLED display technology with powerful Intel Core i9 performance. Perfect for creative professionals and power users.', '1899.00', '2099.00', 'Dell', 'XPS15-I9-4060', 20,
  JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593642632559-0c6d3fc62b89?w=800&q=80', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1588872657578-7efd1f1555ed?w=800&q=80'),
  JSON_OBJECT('Processor', 'Intel Core i9-13900H', 'RAM', '32GB DDR5', 'Storage', '1TB NVMe SSD', 'GPU', 'NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB', 'Display', '15.6" 3.5K OLED Touch', 'Battery', 'Up to 13 hours', 'Weight', '1.86 kg', 'OS', 'Windows 11 Pro'),
  true, true),

(1, 'ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11', 'thinkpad-x1-carbon-gen-11', 'Ultra-light business laptop with Intel vPro', 'The ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11 is the ultimate business ultrabook. Weighing just 1.12kg, it delivers enterprise-grade security and all-day battery life.', '1599.00', '1799.00', 'Lenovo', 'X1C-G11-I7', 25,
  JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1541807084-5c52b6b3adef?w=800&q=80'),
  JSON_OBJECT('Processor', 'Intel Core i7-1365U vPro', 'RAM', '16GB LPDDR5', 'Storage', '512GB SSD', 'Display', '14" 2.8K OLED', 'Battery', 'Up to 15 hours', 'Weight', '1.12 kg', 'OS', 'Windows 11 Pro'),
  false, true),

(1, 'ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14', 'asus-rog-zephyrus-g14', 'AMD Ryzen 9 gaming laptop with RTX 4060', 'The ROG Zephyrus G14 packs incredible gaming performance into a compact 14" chassis. With AMD Ryzen 9 and RTX 4060, it handles any game with ease.', '1449.00', '1599.00', 'ASUS', 'ROG-G14-R9-4060', 18,
  JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1603302576837-37561b2e2302?w=800&q=80'),
  JSON_OBJECT('Processor', 'AMD Ryzen 9 7940HS', 'RAM', '16GB DDR5', 'Storage', '1TB NVMe SSD', 'GPU', 'NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB', 'Display', '14" QHD+ 165Hz', 'Battery', 'Up to 10 hours', 'Weight', '1.65 kg', 'OS', 'Windows 11 Home'),
  true, true),

(1, 'HP Spectre x360 14', 'hp-spectre-x360-14', '2-in-1 convertible with Intel Evo platform', 'The HP Spectre x360 14 is a premium 2-in-1 laptop with a gorgeous OLED display and Intel Evo platform certification for responsiveness and battery life.', '1349.00', '1499.00', 'HP', 'SPECTRE-X360-14', 22,
  JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544731612-de7f96afe55f?w=800&q=80'),
  JSON_OBJECT('Processor', 'Intel Core i7-1355U', 'RAM', '16GB LPDDR5', 'Storage', '512GB SSD', 'Display', '13.5" 3K2K OLED Touch', 'Battery', 'Up to 17 hours', 'Weight', '1.36 kg', 'OS', 'Windows 11 Home'),
  false, true),

(1, 'Razer Blade 15', 'razer-blade-15', 'Premium gaming laptop with RTX 4070', 'The Razer Blade 15 is the world''s smallest 15" gaming laptop. Featuring RTX 4070 graphics and a 240Hz QHD display for the ultimate gaming experience.', '2299.00', '2499.00', 'Razer', 'BLADE15-4070', 10,
  JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1525547719571-a2d4ac8945e2?w=800&q=80'),
  JSON_OBJECT('Processor', 'Intel Core i9-13950HX', 'RAM', '32GB DDR5', 'Storage', '1TB SSD', 'GPU', 'NVIDIA RTX 4070 8GB', 'Display', '15.6" QHD 240Hz', 'Battery', 'Up to 8 hours', 'Weight', '2.01 kg', 'OS', 'Windows 11 Home'),
  true, true);
